$comment: Curated fallback images for items whose primary source offers no og:image (filings, registers). Keyed by source hostname suffix. Every entry is a freely licensed image re-hosted under public/img/stock/ with license, author, and origin recorded; grow this map only via reviewed PRs with the license verified on the origin page. Never official agency seals.

sec.gov.credit: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission headquarters. Photo: AgnosticPreachersKid, CC BY-SA 3.0, via Wikimedia Commons
